pack.icp: Small businesses and startups who need growth.
pack.wtp: Two prospects said budget exists for reducing manual billing work.
pack.competitor_gap: Generic CRMs miss invoice-specific follow-up tone.
pack.outreach: I noticed your team handles invoice follow-ups manually. Would 10 minutes of feedback be useful? Reply stop if not relevant.
pack.landing: Stop chasing unpaid invoices manually. Join a validation pilot for agency owners.
pack.roadmap: Day 1: interview 5 agency owners. Day 2: test pricing. Day 3: publish landing page. Day 4-6: collect replies. Day 7: decide build/pivot/kill.
